title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Salesforce India Ventures Solutions in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Salesforce India Ventures Solutions:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India Ventures Solutions!
